parameters: \innIt's such a big mess that the managers called for some
of us from the inn to help clean up. Meanwhile, the
people who actually work here are on break...
\innAnd on top of that, we have to help
out the people still eating, too.
I don't get paid enough to do this...
\innWe're still cleaning, and even though those Banditos
left a while ago, no one's come back yet...
Kevin came by? Not everyone knows
that he's turned over a new
\innI'm getting hungry just looking at it...
It's great to see you again! I trust
that your journey is going well.
\larAnyways... I came here in search of a new business opportunity. I wanted
to start serving food and selling my \ii[16]\c[0]s in other places than
just Verdin Village. So I bought this old warehouse and converted it
into a profitable restaurant. Soon enough, Larry's going global!
\larWell, now you know me! I'm Larry, owner of
Larry's Marvelous Diner. You should come
up to Verdin Village and give it a try!
revamped it into a profitable warehouse.
Here, try a \ii[16] on the house!

Head up to the counter if you'd like

\solI pity the Tellurian Guard. The Blazing Sands
have always been a source of trouble, but I've
heard that there's been extra bad things
happening there in the past year or so.
I didn't have to do anything about
those Banditos since I was off-duty!
